National Parks Scraping Project
  • Home
  • About 
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd
import json

data_path = Path("data")

df = pd.read_csv(data_path / "base_data.csv")

with open(data_path / "csv_dictionary.json") as f:
    raw = json.load(f)

CSVDictionary = {
    k: pd.DataFrame(v)
    for k, v in raw.items()
}
df.head()

#TESTING BUG

print(df.columns.tolist())
['id', 'url', 'fullName', 'parkCode', 'description', 'latitude', 'longitude', 'latLong', 'activities', 'topics', 'states', 'entranceFees', 'entrancePasses', 'fees', 'directionsInfo', 'directionsUrl', 'operatingHours', 'addresses', 'images', 'weatherInfo', 'name', 'designation', 'multimedia', 'relevanceScore', 'contacts.phoneNumbers', 'contacts.emailAddresses']
import pandas as pd
import json

# Load base_data.csv
base_df = pd.read_csv(data_path/'base_data.csv')

#When was the "base_data.csv" file created?

# Load csv_dictionary.json
with open(data_path/'csv_dictionary.json', 'r') as f:
    csv_dict = json.load(f)

#Do we need this line? The csv was already loaded in the first block

# Prepare a list to collect new rows
rows = []

# For each park in the dictionary
for park_code, records in csv_dict.items():
    for record in records:
        row = base_df[base_df['parkCode'].str.lower() == park_code.lower()].copy()
        if not row.empty:
            row = row.iloc[0].to_dict()
            row['year'] = record['Year']
            row['annual visits'] = record['RecreationVisitors']
            row['total visits'] = record.get('TotalRecreationVisitors', None)
            rows.append(row)

# Create the new DataFrame
combined_df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
combined_df.head()
id url fullName parkCode description latitude longitude latLong activities topics ... weatherInfo name designation multimedia relevanceScore contacts.phoneNumbers contacts.emailAddresses year annual visits total visits

5 rows × 29 columns

# Build a set of activities from all unique park codes in combined_df

activities = set()
import re

for code in combined_df['parkCode'].unique():
    park_rows = combined_df[combined_df['parkCode'] == code]
    for row_activities in park_rows['activities']:
        if isinstance(row_activities, str):
            matches = re.findall(r':\s*([^,;]+)', row_activities)
            for activity in matches:
                cleaned = re.sub(r'[^A-Za-z\s]', '', activity)
                cleaned = cleaned.strip()
                if cleaned and cleaned[0].isupper() and not cleaned.isupper():
                    activities.add(cleaned.lower())
print(activities)
{'canyoneering', 'swimming', 'birdwatching', 'boat tour', 'motorized boating', 'downhill skiing', 'gathering and foraging', 'scuba diving', 'junior ranger program', 'scenic driving', 'horse camping see also camping', 'geocaching', 'mountain climbing', 'busshuttle guided tour', 'park film', 'atv offroading', 'arts and crafts', 'wildlife watching', 'fixed wing flying', 'ice skating', 'food', 'caving', 'horse trekking', 'tubing', 'boating', 'orienteering', 'snowshoeing', 'selfguided tours  auto', 'astronomy', 'crosscountry skiing', 'reenactments', 'gift shop and souvenirs', 'skiing', 'bookstore and park store', 'craft demonstrations', 'shopping', 'first person interpretation', 'rv camping', 'picnicking', 'offtrail permitted hiking', 'dining', 'whitewater rafting', 'hunting', 'rock climbing', 'snow play', 'car or front country camping', 'backcountry hiking', 'snorkeling', 'flying', 'arts and culture', 'horse camping see also horsestock use', 'paddling', 'camping', 'backcountry camping', 'snow tubing', 'compass and gps', 'canoe or kayak camping', 'frontcountry hiking', 'playground', 'stargazing', 'freshwater swimming', 'helicopter flying', 'snowmobiling', 'dog sledding', 'handson', 'hunting and gathering', 'river tubing', 'stand up paddleboarding', 'surfing', 'water skiing', 'climbing', 'cultural demonstrations', 'kayaking', 'auto and atv', 'guided tours', 'volunteer vacation', 'golf', 'theater', 'road biking', 'fishing', 'selfguided tours  walking', 'museum exhibits', 'mountain biking', 'pool swimming', 'sailing', 'hiking', 'biking', 'saltwater fishing', 'citizen science', 'ice climbing', 'horseback riding', 'historic weapons demonstration', 'fly fishing', 'group camping', 'saltwater swimming', 'canoeing', 'auto offroading', 'live music', 'living history', 'freshwater fishing'}
# Create dummy variables for each activity in the set
for activity in activities:
    col_name = f'activity_{activity.replace(" ", "_")}'
    combined_df[col_name] = combined_df['activities'].apply(lambda x: 1 if isinstance(x, str) and activity in x.lower() else 0)
combined_df.head()

combined_df.columns
Index(['id', 'url', 'fullName', 'parkCode', 'description', 'latitude',
       'longitude', 'latLong', 'activities', 'topics',
       ...
       'activity_horseback_riding', 'activity_historic_weapons_demonstration',
       'activity_fly_fishing', 'activity_group_camping',
       'activity_saltwater_swimming', 'activity_canoeing',
       'activity_auto_offroading', 'activity_live_music',
       'activity_living_history', 'activity_freshwater_fishing'],
      dtype='str', length=129)
combined_df.to_csv(data_path/'final.csv', index=False)
